query:
ALTER TABLE employees 
ADD COLUMN workerType ENUM('employee', 'contractor', 'volunteer') DEFAULT 'employee' NOT NULL AFTER endDate,
ADD COLUMN contractStartDate TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER workerType,
ADD COLUMN contractEndDate TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER contractStartDate,
ADD COLUMN hourlyRate DECIMAL(10,2) NULL AFTER contractEndDate,
ADD COLUMN is1099 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE AFTER hourlyRate,
ADD COLUMN contractTerms TEXT NULL AFTER is1099;
